name: gossipcat
description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — parallel review, consensus, adaptive dispatch

scripts.build:mcp: rm -rf dist-mcp && npx esbuild apps/cli/src/mcp-server-sdk.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist-mcp/mcp-server.js --external:ws --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --tsconfig=tsconfig.json && cp -r packages/orchestrator/src/default-skills dist-mcp/default-skills && cp -r packages/orchestrator/src/default-rules dist-mcp/default-rules && cp -r assets dist-mcp/assets && mkdir -p dist-mcp/data && cp data/archetypes.json dist-mcp/data/archetypes.json && chmod +x dist-mcp/mcp-server.js && chmod +x dist-mcp/assets/hooks/worktree-sandbox.sh
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:mcp && npm run build:dashboard
